chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5416 of 2023 Mst. Khadeeja & others Versus Abdul Rehman Wariya & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution (notices not issued as cost not paid/copies not supplied) Dated: 07.12.2023 Mr. M. Asif Bhatti for petitioners. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners submits that the dispute between petitioners and respondents has been settled out of the Court and he has been instructed by the petitioners not to press this petition. Petition is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge Judge
